name: human-training
description: Sprint-based AI-collaboration workflow skills (project genesis, lifecycle, handovers, onboarding, workflow alignment) plus session-authored skills.

interface.shortDescription: Sprint workflow skills for AI-human projects
interface.longDescription: Human Training provides sprint-based workflow skills for project genesis, active development, handovers, onboarding, workflow orientation, robustness audits, and provider-specific working references.
defaultPrompt: Help me shape this project idea into a spec.
Orient to this project workflow and start the next task.
Create a handover for the next session.
